notes: v0.19.3 — HOTFIX. Clicking MULTIPLAYER in v0.19.2 did nothing visible: the matchmaking overlay was being added to the default canvas layer while the PLAY hub renders in menu_layer (layer=10), so the overlay sat BEHIND the hub. Fixed by wrapping the queue / countdown / result overlay in its own CanvasLayer at layer=50 — it now appears above the hub as intended. Clicking MULTIPLAYER → Searching for opponent… overlay shows immediately.
